ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Continued To Feb-01-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 287883 (Conservatorship of Elena Chan).

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rena Harel.

The Court stated that liquidation of the annuities would be permitted as long as a separate trust account is set up and there are proper calculations. Mr. Kato is to submit a supplemental declaration showing how he arrived at the additional percentage interests of the former joint tenant account holders in relation to their interest in the entire trust estate. Both matters were continued to February 1, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The supplemental declaration is to be submitted by January 25, 2010. A separate order regarding the annuities is to be submitted as well.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case no. PTR-05-287883 (Conservatorship of Elena Chan).

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Rena Harel.

Ms. Ng stated that both petitions had been filed and were currently set for July 13, 2009. She stated that one of the petitions included a request for substituted judgment/transfer of assets into the trust estate, noted that the nephew had declined to serve, and that her goal was to have only one petition at the time of the transfer to Orange County.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 287882 and 287883. Lillian Ng appearing for and with Rena Harel, conservator/trustee. Court questioned why venue have not been changed for the conservatorship. Counsel stated the nephew is looking for a successor conservator in Irvine for Dorothy Tong before venue can be changed. He does not want to act as successor conservator. Elena Chan has a trust, they will file a petition for substituted judgment to transfer her assets into the trust. Elena Chan's conservatorship may no longer be necessary. Issue on attorney's fees and conservator's fees addressed. Matters are submitted. Court is setting a status hearing on change of venue for both conservatorship on 10/10. If the nephew has not come up with a successor conservator, Court will pick one.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
